title: P011 SIN -- Test-IntegrityManifest duplicated in AssistedSASC.psm1 and PwShGUI-IntegrityCore.psm1
description: SIN-PATTERN-011 (duplicate function names) is violated: Test-IntegrityManifest and New-IntegrityManifest exist in both modules/AssistedSASC.psm1 and modules/PwShGUI-IntegrityCore.psm1. This causes module load order conflicts and unpredictable behavior. Resolution: remove the duplicate from AssistedSASC.psm1 and ensure it re-exports from IntegrityCore, or wrap with a proxy that delegates. Run Invoke-SINPatternScanner to confirm instance count.
notes: Check for New-IntegrityManifest duplication as well. Use: Select-String -Path modules/*.psm1 -Pattern 'function Test-IntegrityManifest' to locate all occurrences.
